title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NABARD - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NABARD - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at NABARD are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NABARD:
NABARD is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NABARD!
